question: Who are all the Presidents of France?
¿Quiénes son todos los Presidentes de Francia?
Which actor appeared in the most films in a single decade?
¿Qué actor apareció en la mayor cantidad de películas en una sola década?
Who (either an actor or a musician) has received the highest number of awards?
generated:
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
SELECT ?person (COUNT(DISTINCT ?award) AS ?awardCount) (SAMPLE(?lab) AS ?label) WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type dbo:Person .
  FILTER ( EXISTS { ?person rdf:type dbo:Actor } || EXISTS { ?person rdf:type dbr:Musician } || EXISTS { ?person rdf:type dbo:MusicalArtist } )
  ?person (dbo:award|dbp:award) ?award .
  OPTIONAL { ?person rdfs:label ?lab . FILTER(lang(?lab) = 'en') }
} GROUP BY ?person ORDER BY DESC(?awardCount) LIMIT 1

question: ¿Quién (ya sea un actor o un músico) ha recibido el mayor número de premios?
Which are the 5 bands or musicians who have produced the highest number of albums?
generated:
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
SELECT ?artist (SAMPLE(?name) AS ?label) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?album) AS ?albums) WHERE {
  ?album a dbo:Album ;
         (dbo:artist|dbp:artist) ?artist .
  ?artist rdfs:label ?name FILTER(lang(?name)='en').
  FILTER(
    EXISTS { ?artist rdf:type dbo:Band } ||
    EXISTS { ?artist rdf:type dbo:MusicalArtist } ||
    EXISTS { ?artist dbo:occupation dbr:Musician }
  )
}
GROUP BY ?artist
ORDER BY DESC(?albums)
LIMIT 5

question: ¿Cuáles son las 5 bandas o músicos que han producido el mayor número de álbumes?
Which are the top 3 taxonomic kingdoms that have the largest number of endangered species?
generated:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
SELECT ?kingdomIRI (SAMPLE(?kingdomLabel) AS ?kingdomLabel) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?species) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?species (dbo:conservationStatus|dbp:conservationStatus) ?status .
  ?species (dbo:kingdom|dbp:kingdom) ?kingdomIRI .
  OPTIONAL { ?kingdomIRI rdfs:label ?kingdomLabel . FILTER(lang(?kingdomLabel) = 'en') }
  FILTER( regex(lcase(str(?status)), "endanger") || lcase(str(?status)) = "en" )
}
GROUP BY ?kingdomIRI
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 3

question: ¿Cuáles son los 3 reinos taxonómicos con el mayor número de especies en peligro de extinción?
generated:
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?kingdom (COUNT(DISTINCT ?s) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?s rdf:type dbo:Species .
  ?s (dbo:conservationStatus|dbp:conservationStatus|dbo:iucnCategory|dbp:iucnCategory) ?status .
  ?s dbo:kingdom ?kingdom .
  FILTER(regex(lcase(str(?status)), "endang"))
}
GROUP BY ?kingdom
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 3

PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>

WHERE {
  res:Barack_Obama dbo:spouse ?x .

Who are footballers coached by Pep Guardiola?
¿Qué futbolistas han sido entrenados por Pep Guardiola?
generated:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?player (COALESCE(?labelEs, ?labelEn, STR(?player)) AS ?label) WHERE {
  # equipos gestionados por Pep Guardiola (varios predicados posibles)
  ?team (dbo:manager|dbp:manager) dbr:Pep_Guardiola .
  # jugadores que han pertenecido a esos equipos (varios predicados posibles)
  ?player (dbo:team|dbp:team) ?team .
  # etiquetas en español o inglés
  OPTIONAL { ?player rdfs:label ?labelEs FILTER(lang(?labelEs) = 'es') }
  OPTIONAL { ?player rdfs:label ?labelEn FILTER(lang(?labelEn) = 'en') }
}
ORDER BY ?label

question: Through which cities do the rivers originating in Yellowstone National Park flow?

Which alliance has the most member airlines?
golden:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
SELECT ?uri
WHERE {
  ?airline a dbo:Airline .
  ?airline dbp:alliance ?uri .
}
GROUP BY ?uri
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(DISTINCT ?airline))
OFFSET 0 LIMIT 1

Which television shows were produced through a collaboration between HBO and BBC?
¿Qué programas de televisión fueron producidos mediante una colaboración entre HBO y la BBC?
generated:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?show ?label WHERE {
  ?show ?p dbr:HBO .
  ?show ?q dbr:BBC .
  OPTIONAL { ?show rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(lang(?label) IN ('es','en')) }
  FILTER(
    EXISTS{ ?show rdf:type dbo:TelevisionShow } ||
    EXISTS{ ?show rdf:type dbo:TelevisionSeries } ||
    EXISTS{ ?show rdf:type dbo:TelevisionEpisode } ||
    regex(str(?label),'TV','i') || regex(str(?label),'miniseries','i') || regex(str(?label),'television','i')
  )
}
ORDER BY ?label

question: What other countries speak the same language as Brazil's official one?
¿Qué otros países hablan el mismo idioma que el oficial de Brasil?
generated:
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?country ?countryLabel WHERE {
  ?country rdf:type dbo:Country .
  ?country (dbo:officialLanguage|dbp:officialLanguages) dbr:Portuguese_language .
  FILTER(?country NOT IN (dbr:Brazil, dbr:Portuguese_Empire, dbr:Cabe%C3%A7a_do_Cachorro, dbr:Macau))
  OPTIONAL { ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel FILTER(lang(?countryLabel)='en') }
} ORDER BY ?countryLabel

question: Name the island that is part of the Tuamotus archipelago and has its largest city named Rotoava.
Nombra la isla que forma parte del archipiélago de Tuamotu y cuya ciudad más grande se llama Rotoava.
generated:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?island ?islandLabel WHERE {
  ?island dbo:archipelago dbr:Tuamotu .
  ?island rdfs:label ?islandLabel . FILTER(langMatches(lang(?islandLabel), "EN")) .
  ?settlement ?p ?island .
  ?settlement rdfs:label ?settlementLabel . FILTER(langMatches(lang(?settlementLabel), "EN")) .
  FILTER regex(str(?settlementLabel), "Rotoava", "i")
} LIMIT 50

List all the software that works on Linux and MacOS operating systems.
generated:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?software (SAMPLE(?label) AS ?label) WHERE {
  ?software rdf:type dbo:Software .
  ?software (dbo:operatingSystem|dbp:operatingSystem) ?os .
  ?os rdfs:label ?osLabel FILTER(lang(?osLabel)='en') .
  ?software rdfs:label ?label FILTER(lang(?label)='en') .
}
GROUP BY ?software
HAVING(
  SUM(IF(CONTAINS(LCASE(?osLabel),'linux'),1,0))>0
  && SUM(IF(CONTAINS(LCASE(?osLabel),'mac'),1,0))>0
)
ORDER BY ?label

What academic affiliations can be found at universities in Metro Manila?
generated:
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?aff ?affLabel WHERE {
  ?uni rdf:type dbo:University .
  ?uni (dbo:location|dbo:locatedInArea|dbp:location) ?city .
  ?city dbo:isPartOf* dbr:Metro_Manila .
  ?uni (dbo:affiliation|dbp:academicAffiliation|dbp:affiliations) ?aff .
  OPTIONAL { ?aff rdfs:label ?affLabel FILTER(lang(?affLabel) = 'en') }
} ORDER BY ?affLabel

Which other firearms were designed by the creator of the AK-47?

What is the name of the river that has its source in Lake Itasca and its river mouth located in Gulf of Mexico?
generated:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?river WHERE {
  ?river rdf:type ?t .
  ?river rdfs:comment ?c .
  FILTER(regex(str(?c), "Lake Itasca", "i") && regex(str(?c), "Gulf of Mexico", "i"))
  FILTER(EXISTS { ?river dbo:type dbr:River } || EXISTS { ?river dbo:river ?any } || EXISTS { ?river dbo:mouth ?m } )
} LIMIT 10

How many movies there are in French language?
¿Cuántas películas hay en idioma francés?
generated:
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?film) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?film a ?type .
  FILTER(?type IN (dbo:Film, dbo:Work)) .
  ?film (dbo:language|dbp:language) ?lang .
  FILTER( ?lang = dbr:French_language || (isLiteral(?lang) && regex(str(?lang), "French", "i")) )
}
